parallel-dispatch.guard: grep -q 'Promise.all' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/engine/orchestrator.ts && ! grep -q 'for (const toolCall of toolCalls)' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/engine/orchestrator.ts && npx --yes nx test agent-mcp 2>&1 | grep -qE 'passed'
parallel-dispatch.notes: The only source file that changes is orchestrator.ts (lines 232-361). Replace the sequential for-loop with a two-step pattern: (1) serial pre-dispatch loop that runs policy.check() and increments toolCallCount for each tool, aborting the batch on any policy violation; (2) Promise.all that concurrently emits TOOL_CALL event, calls client.callTool, catches non-fatal errors as isError=true results. Append all results after Promise.all resolves. The key footgun: toolCallCount must be incremented BEFORE policy.check() in the pre-dispatch loop, not after result-append as in the old code.

audit-foundation.notes: Checks: Promise.all present, sequential loop absent, call-ID keying, policy check before callTool, toolCallCount arithmetic, test suite green.

code-review.notes: Human hold point. Reviewer inspects orchestrator.ts diff and runs the foundation audit. Creates sentinel when satisfied.

audit-final.notes: Runs all foundation checks plus full build verification and DoD coverage checks.

docs-and-publish.notes: Bump agent-mcp to 1.0.0. Note parallel tool execution in CLAUDE.md and README. Follow PUBLISHING.md exactly.
